name: selectHypothesisFromContext
description: Select axiom in the context as hypothesis and add to the proof tree. Use this function when a standard fact that is not recognized by Event-B should be added, and it has been added to the context. This function will add the selected hypothesis. You need to specify the instantiations for `\forall` or `\exists` hypotheses.

node_id.description: ID of the node in the proof tree to apply this function on.

similar_hypothesis.description: The hypothesis in the node that is the most similar to the goal.
